strategyNotes: Raised Right and Truth Tuned Tribe should not use the same strategy.
Truth Tuned Tribe sells knowledge and curiosity.
Product fit matters more than posting time.
Watch time does not always predict sales.
Holiday products should be requested before the holiday season.
Build recurring content from proven winners.
recommendations: Request more garden problem solvers and water testing products for Raised Right.
Build recurring peptide book content for Truth Tuned Tribe.
Move peptide-heavy products away from Raised Right unless the hook is practical and proof-driven.
Start fall football and Halloween sample requests in August.
Treat pool and July 4th products as short-window items after early July.
wins: Raised Right proved that useful demo products can drive meaningful GMV.
Truth Tuned Tribe found a clear breakout lane with peptide books.
Both accounts qualified for July Spotlight Creator status.
Evergreen products beat trend-only products for next-month planning.
seasonalAlerts: Pool products and July 4th items should slow after early July.
Garden products remain strong in summer but need a fall replacement lane.
Football and tailgating products should be requested before fall demand hits.
Holiday gift products need sample requests well before Q4.
businessRules: Truth Tuned Tribe sells knowledge and curiosity.
Product fit matters more than posting time.
Watch time does not always predict sales.
Holiday products should be requested before the holiday season.
Build recurring content from proven winners.
